restaurants.name: Restaurants
restaurants.message_style: Start with demand signal. Use food imagery words. End with one-tap offer launch.
restaurants.example_hook: 190 people in your area are searching for biryani right now.

dentists.name: Dentists
dentists.message_style: Lead with local search data. Build trust. Offer clear next step.
dentists.example_hook: 190 people in your locality are searching for dental checkups.

salons.name: Salons
salons.message_style: Lead with occasion or trend. Use transformation language. End with booking CTA.
salons.example_hook: Wedding season is 3 weeks away. 85 brides searched salons in your area today.

gyms.name: Gyms
gyms.message_style: Lead with results or urgency. Use active verbs. Make the ask feel easy.
gyms.example_hook: Summer is 6 weeks away. 40 people in your area are searching for gyms this week.

pharmacies.name: Pharmacies
pharmacies.message_style: Lead with care signal. Keep it simple. One compliance or convenience action.
pharmacies.example_hook: 3 of your regular customers are due for refills this week.
